creator: s.moeding@ndh.net
text:
Hi!

Finally I was able to work on my port of lclint, which was a bit
outdated.  The diffs for the latest version (2.4b) are included.  The
new file pkg/MESSAGE wasn't in the last port.

Feel free to contact me if you encounter problems.

Stefan
